authority.department: Labour Department, Government of Andhra Pradesh

overview: State-specific labour law requirements applicable to establishments operating in Andhra Pradesh.

rules.title: Review Andhra Pradesh Shops and Establishments Registration
rules.description: Determine whether registration under the Andhra Pradesh Shops and Establishments legislation is applicable.

citations.reference: Andhra Pradesh Shops and Establishments legislation

rules.title: Maintain Statutory Registers
rules.description: Maintain registers, records and notices prescribed under Andhra Pradesh labour laws.

rules.title: Display Statutory Notices
rules.description: Display statutory notices required under applicable Andhra Pradesh labour laws.

rules.title: Review State Holidays and Leave Requirements
rules.description: Ensure compliance with state-specific holidays, leave and weekly off requirements applicable in Andhra Pradesh.

recommended.title: Annual Labour Compliance Review
recommended.description: Conduct an annual review of state labour law compliance.

recommended.title: Digitise Statutory Registers
recommended.description: Maintain electronic compliance records wherever legally permissible.
